message:
test(syscall): MR tgkill/tkill parity + tgid mismatch ESRCH (bd-imo7)

Two metamorphic tests that fence sys_tgkill's extra tgid guard against
pid reuse — a property sys_tkill deliberately lacks.

sys_tgkill_tkill_parity_on_self_null_signal
  For the current thread, tgkill(getpid, gettid, 0) and tkill(gettid, 0)
  must both succeed. The refinement relation (tgkill adds a tgid check
  on top of tkill) requires agreement on threads the caller owns.

sys_tgkill_mismatched_tgid_is_esrch
  tgkill(1, gettid, 0) — our live tid cannot belong to pid 1's thread
  group — must fail with ESRCH. tkill on the same tid would succeed,
  so this asserts tgkill's distinctive rejection path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
